design_philosophy: Natural and elegant style focusing on high-quality agricultural transformation. Using warm beige bases, imperial gold accents, and deep forest greens to communicate organic luxury.

components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/70 border-b border-[#E5E0D5]/50 sticky top-0 z-50
components.buttons: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-body tracking-wide transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg
components.contact_form: Shadcn based but highly customized. Use flat solid surface #F4F1E9 with subtle 1px border. Inputs should have transparent background, bottom border only (border-b-2) or soft rounded with very light background. Focus state: ring-0 border-secondary.
components.product_showcase: Cardless layout. Large edge-to-edge image on one side, generous p-16 text container on the other. Optical alignment.
components.animations: Framer motion for scroll reveals. Lenis for momentum scrolling. Parallax effects on background images.

images.description: Golden oil being poured, high-end culinary feel. Use for Hero section or main Product showcase.
Peanuts in shell spilling on a wooden table. Perfect for 'About the ingredients' or 'Transformation' section.
Elegant green agricultural fields. Use as a parallax background or section divider with a dark green or light beige overlay.
Golden oil pouring from metal spout. Very rich amber/gold tones. Excellent for the Product details section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `lenis` or `@studio-freight/react-lenis` for smooth momentum scrolling. This is MANDATORY.
Install `framer-motion` for scroll animations and stagger effects.
Use standard HTML tags for layout structure (bento grids, asymmetry), heavily customized with Tailwind. Do NOT use Shadcn Card components for the main layout to avoid a 'boxy SaaS' look.
For the Contact section, use Shadcn Form, Input, and Textarea, but remove the standard borders. Style them with a minimalist 'Editorial' look (e.g., border-b only, or soft muted backgrounds).
Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements (navigation links, buttons, and form inputs).
Apply `text-primary` (Dark Green) for primary headings and text, and `text-secondary` (Imperial Gold) for accents and call-to-actions.
Hero Section: Feature the slogan 'Goûtez l'ultime !' prominently using the `Cormorant Garamond` font. It should feel luxurious and grounded.
Avoid standard center-aligned text blocks. Use asymmetrical left-aligned text with large negative space.
Never use pure black or pure white. Use the provided theme colors (#FDFBF7 and #1A3626).

Ensure high contrast and accessibility. If placing text over images, use a subtle gradient overlay (e.g., bg-gradient-to-t from-[#FDFBF7]/80 to-transparent) instead of a harsh black/white opacity screen.
